A '''sanger''' was a low-profile defensive position that could be constructed from rocks, [[Wood/Legends|logs]], or other available objects. [[Clone commando/Legends|Clone commando]] [[Darman Skirata|RC-1136]] was taught how to build a sanger by [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] combat instructor [[Kal Skirata]] and built one from half-decayed logs while on a [[Mission to Qiilura|mission]] to<ref name="RC:HC" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]<ref name="RC:HC" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
A sanger appeared in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact|Hard Contact]]'', the first novel in the ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="RC:HC" /> In real life, a [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sangar_(fortification) Sangar] is a similar fortification, albeit with a different spelling.<ref name="Dict">{{WebCite|url=https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/sangar|text=Sangar Definition & Meaning|work=[[Wikipedia:Merriam-Webster|Merriam-Webster]]|archivedate=20220730184646}}</ref>
